title: bromus racemosus var. genuinus
intro: Bromus racemosus var. genuinus, also known as smooth brome, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. It is a perennial grass native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa, and has been naturalized in many other parts of the world. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of smooth brome include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption.
